vocab.example: I've noticed a seamless integration of AI chatbots on most e-commerce sites, which makes getting support much faster.

vocab.meaning: giao diện lộn xộn, rối mắt
vocab.example: One major change is that they’ve moved away from a cluttered interface to a more minimalist design to enhance readability.

vocab.meaning: các đề xuất được cá nhân hóa
vocab.example: Streaming platforms have drastically improved their personalized recommendations, accurately predicting what I want to watch next.

vocab.meaning: quảng cáo gây phiền hà/xâm nhập
vocab.example: Unfortunately, some news sites have adopted more intrusive advertising, with pop-ups that hinder the overall browsing experience.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế web tương thích (với nhiều thiết bị)
vocab.example: The most significant upgrade is the shift toward responsive web design, ensuring the layout looks perfect on both tablets and smartphones.

vocab.meaning: các chỉ số đo lường mức độ tương tác của người dùng
vocab.example: Websites are constantly evolving based on user engagement metrics to ensure that the most popular content is highlighted.

vocab.meaning: tính năng chế độ tối (nền đen)
vocab.example: Almost every site I visit now offers dark mode functionality, which is a blessing for reducing eye strain during night-time browsing.

vocab.meaning: điều hướng trực quan (dễ hiểu, dễ dùng)
vocab.example: The developers have prioritized intuitive navigation, allowing users to find obscure settings without having to dig through menus.
They have overhauled their backend system to patch security vulnerabilities and protect user accounts from potential breaches.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa tốc độ tải trang
vocab.example: Thanks to better loading speed optimization, the high-resolution images on the gallery site now appear almost instantaneously.
